description: All three signer types expose into_inner() -> Arc<dyn SigningBackend> in their public API. SigningBackend (from secretx_core) is not re-exported from secretx-signature. Callers need to add secretx_core as a direct dependency to name the returned trait type, which is an ergonomic friction for a type that is central to this crate's own API. SecretError is already re-exported (line 49), so the precedent exists. Affected methods: Ed25519Signer::into_inner (line 133), EcdsaP256Signer::into_inner (line 192), RsaPssSigner::into_inner (line 258) in /home/mark/PROJECT/crate-secretsx/secretx-signature/src/lib.rs
title: into_inner() returns SigningBackend type not re-exported
